title: Matchday 7 Recap
subtitle: Portugal, England and Colombia get their tournaments going

questions.q: England opened their Group L campaign against which European rival?
questions.explain: England faced Croatia in their first group match in Arlington, Texas.

questions.q: Which stadium hosted England vs Croatia?
questions.explain: The match was played at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, near Dallas.

questions.q: Portugal began their Group K campaign in which US city?
questions.explain: Portugal's opener was staged in Houston.

questions.q: Making a notable World Cup appearance on Matchday 7, Uzbekistan faced which South American side?
questions.explain: Uzbekistan met Colombia in Mexico City in Group K.

questions.q: Ghana vs Panama was played in which Canadian host city?
questions.explain: Toronto hosted the Group L meeting between Ghana and Panama.

questions.q: England, Croatia, Ghana and Panama all belong to which group?
questions.explain: All four sides are in Group L at the 2026 World Cup.

questions.q: 2026 is the first World Cup to feature how many teams?
questions.explain: The field expanded to 48 teams for the first time in 2026.

questions.q: The 2026 World Cup is co-hosted by the USA, Canada and which third nation?
questions.explain: The USA, Canada and Mexico are sharing hosting duties.

questions.q: Which all-time great captains Portugal at this tournament?
questions.explain: Cristiano Ronaldo leads the Portugal side once again.

questions.q: The 2026 World Cup final on July 19 will be held at which venue?
questions.explain: The final is at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey.
